name: Battle of Waterloo
summary: Napoleon Bonaparte was defeated by British and Prussian forces, ending his rule and marking the conclusion of the Napoleonic Wars.

name: Congress of Vienna Concludes
summary: European powers finalized a new political order after the Napoleonic Wars, redrawing borders and establishing a balance of power to maintain stability.

name: Napoleon Escapes Elba (Hundred Days Begins)
summary: Napoleon escaped exile on Elba and returned to France, regaining power and initiating the brief period known as the Hundred Days.

name: Napoleon Abdicates for the Second Time
summary: Following his defeat at Waterloo, Napoleon abdicated the French throne for a second time, leading to his final exile.

name: Mount Tambora Eruption
summary: Mount Tambora erupted in one of the most powerful volcanic events in recorded history, causing widespread devastation and leading to global climate effects.

name: Kandyan Convention Signed
summary: The Kingdom of Kandy was annexed by the British Empire, bringing the entire island of Sri Lanka under British colonial rule.

name: German Confederation Established
summary: The German Confederation was created as a loose association of German states, replacing the Holy Roman Empire and shaping future German politics.
